scientific_integrity.detail: No fabricated statistics, p-values, or citations were produced across all evaluated outputs; all claims trace to input data or documented tool behavior.

practice_boundaries.detail: Skill explicitly warns against overinterpreting pseudotime values as absolute time.

methodological_ground.detail: Diffusion pseudotime and PAGA are established trajectory inference methods; limitations documented.

code_usability.detail: Script compiles cleanly; --seed parameter exposed and documented. np.random.seed() call requirement documented in Limitations but not confirmed in script.

functional_suitability.note: Core bioinformatics data processing functionality is complete; minor gaps in edge-case handling or output completeness exist.

reliability.note: Fallback Template includes structured FALLBACK REPORT block; corrected safe path guidance in Error Handling.

performance_context.note: SKILL.md 159 lines — lean after progressive disclosure.

agent_usability.note: When to Use contains concrete domain-specific use-case bullets; corrected path guidance added to Error Handling.

human_usability.note: Simplified parameter table and clear input format specification improve discoverability.

security.note: Path traversal rejection with corrected safe path guidance in Error Handling.

maintainability.note: The skill is modular and self-contained, with low overhead for future updates to bioinformatics data processing logic or output formats.

agent_specific.note: --seed parameter exposed (default 42); np.random.seed() requirement documented in Limitations for PAGA reproducibility; script-level call not confirmed.

key_strengths: SKILL.md reduced to 159 lines via progressive disclosure — significantly improves token efficiency
--seed parameter exposed (default 42) with np.random.seed() requirement documented for PAGA reproducibility
Corrected safe path guidance in Error Handling — closes the v2 path traversal response gap
Fallback Template includes structured FALLBACK REPORT block with all required fields
When to Use contains concrete domain-specific use-case bullets

recommendations.title: PAGA pseudotime np.random.seed() call not confirmed in script
recommendations.problem: Limitations documents that the script must call np.random.seed(args.seed) before noise addition, but no such call was found in scripts/main.py during inspection.
recommendations.root_cause: Documentation fix applied to SKILL.md but script-level implementation was not performed.
recommendations.fix: Add np.random.seed(args.seed) in scripts/main.py before the np.random.normal(0, 0.05) noise addition step in compute_paga_trajectory. This is a one-line fix.

recommendations.title: No explicit escape hatch for Slingshot or Monocle trajectory methods
recommendations.problem: The skill supports diffusion and PAGA only. Users requesting Slingshot or Monocle3 will receive confusing errors.
recommendations.root_cause: Method enum is limited to diffusion and paga; no redirect for other methods.
recommendations.fix: Add to Input Validation or Error Handling: 'For Slingshot or Monocle3 trajectory inference, use R-based tools (Slingshot package, Monocle3 package) instead.'
